maps.title: Abraham's Journey
maps.summary: God calls Abraham from Ur and forms a covenant family through faith and obedience.

maps.title: The Exodus Route
maps.summary: God delivers Israel from Egypt and leads them toward the promised land.

maps.title: Jesus' Ministry
maps.summary: Jesus' ministry moves through Galilee and Judea toward the cross and resurrection.

maps.title: Paul's Missionary Journeys
maps.summary: Paul carries the gospel across the Mediterranean world.

maps.title: Seven Churches of Revelation
maps.summary: The risen Christ addresses seven churches in Asia Minor.

timeline.summary: God creates the world, humanity falls, and redemption is promised.
God forms covenant promises through Abraham, Isaac, Jacob, and Joseph.
Israel is delivered from Egypt and receives the covenant at Sinai.
Israel rises, divides, declines, and experiences exile.
Jesus is born, ministers, dies, rises, and commissions His followers.
The Spirit empowers the church and the gospel spreads to the nations.
Christ reigns and makes all things new.

characters.name: Abraham
characters.lessons: Walk by faith when the destination is unclear.

characters.name: Moses
characters.lessons: God uses reluctant servants for deliverance.

characters.name: David
characters.lessons: A heart after God returns quickly in repentance.

characters.name: Esther
characters.lessons: God positions His people for courageous moments.

characters.name: Daniel
characters.lessons: Faithfulness is possible in hostile cultures.

characters.name: Peter
characters.lessons: Failure is not final when Christ restores.

places.name: Jerusalem
places.importance: Temple city, Davidic capital, crucifixion and resurrection events.

places.name: Bethlehem
places.importance: City of David and birthplace of Jesus.

places.name: Capernaum
places.importance: Major center of Jesus' Galilean ministry.

places.name: Nineveh
places.importance: Assyrian city where Jonah preached repentance.

places.name: Babylon
places.importance: Place of exile and symbol of worldly empire.

events.title: Creation
events.summary: God creates the heavens, earth, and humanity.

events.title: The Flood
events.summary: God judges evil and preserves Noah's family.

events.title: Exodus
events.summary: God delivers Israel from slavery in Egypt.

events.title: Birth of Christ
events.summary: Jesus is born in Bethlehem as Savior and King.

events.title: Crucifixion
events.summary: Jesus dies for the sins of the world.

events.title: Resurrection
events.summary: Jesus rises from the dead in victory.

events.title: Pentecost
events.summary: The Holy Spirit empowers the church for witness.
